targets.rawSql:
WITH items AS (
  SELECT
    'kline' AS dataset,
    '${kline_interval}' AS interval,
    MAX(close_time) AS latest_utc,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE $__timeFilter(close_time)) AS rows_in_range,
    CASE '${kline_interval}' WHEN '1m' THEN 0.25 WHEN '5m' THEN 0.50 WHEN '15m' THEN 1.00 WHEN '1h' THEN 2.00 WHEN '4h' THEN 8.00 ELSE 48.00 END AS sla_hours
  FROM dashboard.futures_index_price_klines_${kline_interval}
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    'futures_metrics' AS dataset,
    '${metrics_interval}' AS interval,
    MAX(create_time) AS latest_utc,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE $__timeFilter(create_time)) AS rows_in_range,
    CASE '${metrics_interval}' WHEN '5m' THEN 0.50 WHEN '15m' THEN 1.00 WHEN '1h' THEN 2.00 WHEN '4h' THEN 8.00 ELSE 48.00 END AS sla_hours
  FROM dashboard.futures_metrics_${metrics_interval}
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    'sentiment' AS dataset,
    '${sentiment_interval}' AS interval,
    MAX(create_time) AS latest_utc,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE $__timeFilter(create_time)) AS rows_in_range,
    CASE '${sentiment_interval}' WHEN '1h' THEN 2.00 WHEN '4h' THEN 8.00 ELSE 48.00 END AS sla_hours
  FROM dashboard.sentiment_${sentiment_interval}
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    'prediction' AS dataset,
    '${kline_interval}' AS interval,
    MAX(target_time) AS latest_utc,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE $__timeFilter(target_time)) AS rows_in_range,
    CASE '${kline_interval}' WHEN '1m' THEN 0.25 WHEN '5m' THEN 0.50 WHEN '15m' THEN 1.00 WHEN '1h' THEN 2.00 WHEN '4h' THEN 8.00 ELSE 48.00 END AS sla_hours
  FROM dashboard.predictions_${kline_interval}
  WHERE model_name = '${model_name}'
), aged AS (
  SELECT
    dataset,
    interval,
    latest_utc,
    rows_in_range,
    sla_hours,
    ROUND((EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM ((NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') - latest_utc)) / 3600.0)::NUMERIC, 2) AS age_hours
  FROM items
)
SELECT
  dataset,
  interval,
  latest_utc,
  rows_in_range,
  age_hours,
  sla_hours,
  CASE
    WHEN latest_utc IS NULL THEN 'NO_DATA'
    WHEN age_hours > sla_hours THEN 'STALE'
    ELSE 'OK'
  END AS status
FROM aged
ORDER BY CASE dataset WHEN 'kline' THEN 1 WHEN 'futures_metrics' THEN 2 WHEN 'sentiment' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END;

WITH cfg AS (
  SELECT
    CASE '${kline_interval}' WHEN '1m' THEN 60.0 WHEN '5m' THEN 300.0 WHEN '15m' THEN 900.0 WHEN '1h' THEN 3600.0 WHEN '4h' THEN 14400.0 ELSE 86400.0 END AS kline_step,
    CASE '${metrics_interval}' WHEN '5m' THEN 300.0 WHEN '15m' THEN 900.0 WHEN '1h' THEN 3600.0 WHEN '4h' THEN 14400.0 ELSE 86400.0 END AS metrics_step,
    CASE '${sentiment_interval}' WHEN '1h' THEN 3600.0 WHEN '4h' THEN 14400.0 ELSE 86400.0 END AS sentiment_step
), points AS (
  SELECT 'kline' AS dataset, close_time AS ts, kline_step AS step_seconds
  FROM dashboard.futures_index_price_klines_${kline_interval}, cfg
  WHERE $__timeFilter(close_time)
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'futures_metrics' AS dataset, create_time AS ts, metrics_step AS step_seconds
  FROM dashboard.futures_metrics_${metrics_interval}, cfg
  WHERE $__timeFilter(create_time)
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'sentiment' AS dataset, create_time AS ts, sentiment_step AS step_seconds
  FROM dashboard.sentiment_${sentiment_interval}, cfg
  WHERE $__timeFilter(create_time)
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'prediction' AS dataset, target_time AS ts, kline_step AS step_seconds
  FROM dashboard.predictions_${kline_interval}, cfg
  WHERE $__timeFilter(target_time)
    AND model_name = '${model_name}'
), ordered AS (
  SELECT
    dataset,
    ts,
    step_seconds,
    LAG(ts) OVER (PARTITION BY dataset ORDER BY ts) AS prev_ts
  FROM points
), scored AS (
  SELECT
    dataset,
    ts,
    prev_ts,
    step_seconds,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (ts - prev_ts)) AS gap_seconds
  FROM ordered
)
SELECT
  dataset,
  COUNT(*) AS rows_checked,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE prev_ts IS NOT NULL AND gap_seconds > step_seconds * 1.5) AS gap_events,
  ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN prev_ts IS NOT NULL AND gap_seconds > step_seconds * 1.5 THEN GREATEST((gap_seconds / step_seconds) - 1, 0) ELSE 0 END), 0)::NUMERIC, 0) AS estimated_missing_buckets,
  ROUND(MAX(gap_seconds / 60.0)::NUMERIC, 2) AS max_gap_minutes
FROM scored
GROUP BY dataset
ORDER BY CASE dataset WHEN 'kline' THEN 1 WHEN 'futures_metrics' THEN 2 WHEN 'sentiment' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END;

WITH evaluated AS (
  SELECT
    target_time,
    predicted_close,
    actual_close,
    LOWER(predicted_direction) AS predicted_direction,
    COALESCE(prediction_error, predicted_close - actual_close) AS error,
    LAG(actual_close) OVER (ORDER BY target_time) AS previous_actual_close
  FROM dashboard.predictions_${kline_interval}
  WHERE $__timeFilter(target_time)
    AND model_name = '${model_name}'
    AND predicted_close IS NOT NULL
    AND actual_close IS NOT NULL
), scored AS (
  SELECT
    *,
    CASE
      WHEN previous_actual_close IS NULL OR predicted_direction IS NULL THEN NULL
      WHEN predicted_direction IN ('up', 'bullish', 'long') AND actual_close > previous_actual_close THEN 1.0
      WHEN predicted_direction IN ('down', 'bearish', 'short') AND actual_close < previous_actual_close THEN 1.0
      WHEN predicted_direction IN ('flat', 'neutral', 'sideways') AND actual_close = previous_actual_close THEN 1.0
      ELSE 0.0
    END AS direction_hit
  FROM evaluated
)
SELECT
  COUNT(*) AS evaluated_predictions,
  ROUND(AVG(ABS(error))::NUMERIC, 2) AS mae,
  ROUND((AVG(ABS(error) / NULLIF(actual_close, 0)) * 100)::NUMERIC, 4) AS mape_pct,
  ROUND(AVG(direction_hit)::NUMERIC, 4) AS directional_accuracy,
  ROUND(MAX(ABS(error))::NUMERIC, 2) AS max_abs_error
FROM scored;
